title: Agoer Christmas Kraft Gift Bags 12 Pack, 6 Designs Xmas Paper Bags with Handles,Mixed Sizes (S/M/L) Christmas Goody Treat Candy Bags for Halloween Xmas Gift Wrapping and Party Supplies
features: Agoer Christmas Gift Bags Set:Includes 12 high-quality kraft paper gift bags in mixed sizes (S/M/L), 12 festive hanging tags, and 10m hemp rope. A complete set to make your Christmas gift packaging creative, thoughtful, and memorable.

Mixed Sizes & Festive Designs:This paper party bags set includes 4 small (21×15×8cm), 4 medium (23×17.5×9cm), and 4 large (27×21×11cm) bags.Featuring 6 unique Christmas patterns, including festive greetings, Santa Claus, bells, reindeer, stockings, and other seasonal designs. Perfect for adding charm and variety to your holiday gifting.

Premium Kraft Paper & Sturdy Handles:Made of durable 200g kraft paper with strong cotton rope handles for easy carrying. Reinforced foldable bottoms ensure extra strength and stability for heavier gifts while allowing bags to be stored flat when not in use.

Versatile for All Gifts:Ideal for packing Christmas presents such as books, toys, sweets, clothing, or small hampers. These party bags provide a neat and festive solution for both personal and party gifting needs

More Festive Choices from Agoer:Explore our full Christmas collection, including wood slices for crafts, shatterproof christmas baubles, Poinsettia Christmas Flowers, snowflake clips with string, clear fillable baubles, magnetic bookmarks, and Christmas-themed sticky notes – perfect for holiday décor and gifting.
description: Product Description Celebrate the Joy of Gifting with Agoer Add festive charm to every gift with the Agoer Christmas Gift Bags Set. Includes 12 kraft paper bags in mixed sizes (S/M/L) with 6 Christmas designs — Santa,Christmas trees,reindeer, bells, stockings and joyful greetings. Eco-friendly and easy to use for all your holiday gifting. Perfect Sizes for Every Gift Designed in three practical sizes for all your Christmas surprises— Small (21×15×8 cm) for treats, Medium (23×17.5×9 cm) for books, Large (27×21×11 cm) for toys and hampers.Enjoy six festive patterns that add variety and holiday cheer to every gift Crafted with Care for Quality & Strength Made from 200G premium kraft paper, each bag features sturdy cotton handles for a comfortable grip. The reinforced base adds strength and balance for heavier gifts. Durable and reusable, these eco-friendly bags offer a stylish alternative to disposable wrapping. From office parties to cosy family gatherings, Agoer Christmas Gift Bags make festive preparations simple and joyful. Use them for presents, party favours, or small hampers — a beautiful way to share warmth and gratitude this Christmas season
